The '''S87 "perpetual charge" power plant dynamo''' was a powerplant produced by [[Gurian]] and used in the [[Swift Assault 5]] hoverscout. A [[Power capacitor/Legends|power capacitor]] initiated a reaction in the blower, and the energy from the reaction was recycled by [[back-blast impeller]]s into the hoverscout's air cushion in an efficient use of power generation that gave the vehicle a longer range than other hover vehicles of comparable size and type.
